heading: Specific enforcement
label: 6762 Specific enforcement

children.text: restrain any violation of section 6726 or 6745 of this title; and
compel the taking of any action required by or under this chapter or the Convention.

children.label: A
children.text: in the case of a civil action described in subsection (a)(1), in the United States district court for the judicial district in which any act, omission, or transaction constituting a violation of section 6726 or 6745 of this title occurred or in which the defendant is found or transacts business; or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a civil action described in subsection (a)(2), in the United States district court for the judicial district in which the defendant is found or transacts business.

children.heading: Service of process
children.label: 2 Service of process
children.text: In any such civil action process may be served on a defendant wherever the defendant may reside or may be found, whether the defendant resides or may be found within the United States or elsewhere.
